constraints.name: noSelfConnection
constraints.message: Cannot connect a card to itself

constraints.name: positivePrice
constraints.message: Price per person cannot be negative

constraints.name: positiveCost
constraints.message: Cost per person cannot be negative

constraints.name: positiveMinLeadDays
constraints.message: Minimum prep lead days cannot be negative

constraints.name: positiveMaxLeadDays
constraints.message: Maximum prep lead days cannot be negative

constraints.name: leadDaysOrder
constraints.message: Max prep lead days must be >= min prep lead days

constraints.name: validDayOfWeek
constraints.message: Day of week must be between 0 and 6

constraints.name: positiveBudget
constraints.message: Total budget amount must be non-negative

constraints.name: hasIdempotencyKey
constraints.message: Idempotency key is required for workflow tracking

constraints.name: validComplexity
constraints.message: Complexity must be between 1 (simple) and 5 (very complex)

constraints.name: validGuestRange
constraints.message: Maximum guests must be >= minimum guests

constraints.name: positiveTotalTime
constraints.message: Total estimated time must be non-negative

constraints.name: hasIdempotencyKey
constraints.message: Idempotency key is required for workflow tracking

constraints.name: hasEventId
constraints.message: Event ID is required for task generation

constraints.name: validTags
constraints.message: Recipe cannot have more than 20 tags

constraints.name: validWasteFactor
constraints.message: Waste factor must be greater than 0

constraints.name: validShiftTimes
constraints.message: Shift end must be after shift start
